title: Amtech S4435 Tile nipper
features: DURABLE: This tile nipper is made from strong, drop forged steel
TOUGH CUTTING EDGES: With tough carbide cutting edges, it is designed for cutting tiles up to 6mm (1/4") thick
EASY TO USE: It is spring loaded with comfortable PVC handles for ease of use
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Hand Tools > Masonry & Tiling Tools
